nodes.body: <<FILL role=setup words=42 beats='rain patters on the window while Milo watches; the big rain softens to a gentle drizzle; Grandma smiles and says today is Puddle Jumping Day; Milo cheers and runs to find his rain things'>>

<<FILL role=setup words=40 beats='Milo tugs on his red rubber boots and his yellow raincoat, zip; Grandma opens the door to a drippy, shiny world that smells like wet leaves; the wet sidewalk sparkles as if it is waiting just for them'>>

<<FILL role=setup words=38 beats='by the garden gate waits the very first puddle, small and round like a cookie; Milo does a warm-up hop, splish; Grandma laughs and takes his hand, and they walk down to the corner'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=44 beats='at the corner the walk splits two ways; down the quiet lane, trees drip and little puddles dot the path like polka dots; down the hill, rainwater hurries along the curb in a chattering little stream; Grandma says Milo gets to pick'>>

choices.label: Take the hill with the stream.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=40 beats='under the dripping trees, raindrops go plip plop on Milo’s hood; he hops puddle to puddle down the polka-dot lane; then he stops, because something small and pink is wiggling on the wet path just ahead'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=44 beats='it is a little earthworm, wiggling on the hard wet path far from any dirt; just past it shines a huge flat puddle, smooth as a mirror; Grandma asks what Milo wants to do, help the worm get home or tiptoe to the giant mirror puddle'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='Milo finds a big wet leaf and Grandma helps him scoot the worm gently onto it, like a tiny stretcher; slow and careful, step by step, they carry the worm over to the soft brown dirt of the flower bed'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=45 beats='the worm slides into the soft rainy dirt and does a happy wiggle, home at last; Grandma gives Milo a high five with a squelchy glove; they splash all the way home for warm cocoa, and Milo tells the worm story at dinner'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='the mirror puddle is the biggest puddle Milo has ever seen, flat and shiny, holding a whole upside-down sky with clouds and their two smiling faces; Milo backs up three big steps and bends his knees'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=36 beats='Grandma counts one, two, three; Milo runs, boots thumping, raincoat flapping, and jumps as high as he can over the shining sky puddle; for one whole second he is flying'>>

choices.label: Come down with a great big splash.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=completion words=45 beats='SPLASH; silver drops fly up like fireworks and patter down on their hoods; the mirror puddle wobbles into giggly rings; Milo is soaked and Grandma is soaked and nobody minds one bit, because that was the biggest splash of the whole day'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=40 beats='rainwater hurries along the curb in a busy little stream, burbling downhill; a leaf sails past like a tiny boat, spins, and zooms away; far down at the bottom of the hill, the clouds are opening and one warm sunbeam pokes through'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=44 beats='Milo trots beside the chattering stream; Grandma spots a big shiny leaf that would make a splendid boat, and far below the sunbeam grows brighter and warmer; Milo can race a leaf boat down the stream, or follow the sunbeam all the way down the hill'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='Milo sets the leaf boat on the stream and it zips off, bobbing and twirling through tiny rapids, past a twig and around a pebble; Milo runs alongside in his red boots, cheering his boat on'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=36 beats='near the bottom of the hill the water swirls toward a drain grate, the finish line; the leaf boat wobbles, tips, then rights itself and shoots ahead; Milo reaches out his hand just in time'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=45 beats='got it; Milo scoops up the champion leaf boat right at the finish line, drippy and proud; Grandma cheers hooray; Milo tucks the winning leaf into his pocket like a shiny medal, and they stomp-splash all the way home to tell everyone'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='they follow the sunbeam down the hill as the drizzle turns to sprinkles and then to nothing at all; every puddle turns gold in the new light, like little mirrors full of treasure, and the wet street begins to sparkle'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=34 beats='Grandma stops at the bottom of the hill and points up over the rooftops; Milo tips his head way back, holds Grandma’s hand tight, and looks up, up, up'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=45 beats='a whole rainbow arches over the town, red and orange and yellow and green and blue and purple, glowing in the washed-clean sky; Milo and Grandma name every color together and walk home right under it, the best surprise of Puddle Jumping Day'>>
